title: arenaria serpyllifolia subsp. minutiflora
intro: Arenaria serpyyllifolia subsp. minutiflora, also known as lesser mouse-ear, is a subspecies of flowering plant belonging to the family Caryophyllaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits associated with Arenaria serpyllifolia subsp. minutiflora include its potential to treat digestive issues, respiratory problems, and skin conditions, due to its antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
